title: How to Put The Moon Queen to Sleep
description:
New editor Yaichiro Hitsujiya is avoided by the authors he manages because his calm and gentle personality tends to make them fall asleep during meetings. Despite this, he is determined to support them however he can.

When he is tasked with delivering documents to the famous and notoriously strict author Sumika Tsukishiro, he finds her exhausted and acting like a child due to severe sleep deprivation. To help her finish her work, Yaichiro makes an unexpected decision: first, he has to get her to sleep. Thus begins a heartwarming and comedic story between a kind-hearted editor and a talented but overworked novelist
author: Fujikata Tsumuri
